messages.content: Role: AI/ML Engineer. Configure the project, link it to git@github.com:HUBTECH-DEV/codex-ai-ml-config.git, document changes in GitHub and GitLab, summarize the project objective, draw use cases, evaluate storage for machine learning in code development, treat it as a beta branch, and propose actions to optimize role, persona and prompt configurations while extracting intent and requester preferences.

Validated the existing framework, activated AI/ML Engineer configuration v2, created the beta branch, documented the target architecture, use cases, storage decision, roadmap and release notes, and prepared dual-remote publication with GitLab creation left gated by destination confirmation when discovery could not prove an existing project.
